updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"> <corners android:radius="24dp" /> <gradient android:angle="0" android:endColor="@color/blue_700" android:startColor="@color/teal_200" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <vector xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:width="24dp" android:height="24dp" android:viewportWidth="24" android:viewportHeight="24"> <path android:fillColor="@color/white" android:fillAlpha="0.54" android:pathData="M12,12c2.21,0 4,-1.79 4,-4s-1.79,-4 -4,-4 -4,1.79 -4,4 1.79,4 4,4zM12,14c-2.67,0 -8,1.34 -8,4v2h16v-2c0,-2.66 -5.33,-4 -8,-4z" /> </vector>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/white">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center" android:text="Home" android:textSize="24sp" />
</FrameLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:background="@color/white" android:fillViewport="true" tools:context=".ui.customer.CustomerHomeFragment">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/customer_home_title" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="28sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/customer_home_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/gray_700" android:textSize="16sp" />
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/customer_home_request_card" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="140dp" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:background="@drawable/customer_home_request_banner" android:foreground="?attr/selectableItemBackground" android:padding="20dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="@android:color/transparent" app:cardCornerRadius="24dp" app:cardElevation="6dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/customer_home_request_title" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="20sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/customer_home_request_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/white" android:textSize="14sp" /> </LinearLayout>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="56dp" android:layout_height="56dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="#4DA3FF" app:cardCornerRadius="28dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp">
<ImageView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:contentDescription="@null" android:padding="14dp" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_input_add" app:tint="@color/white" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="24dp" android:text="@string/customer_home_features_title" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/white" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeColor="#B8EFE3" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="#CCF8EF" app:cardCornerRadius="14dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/customer_home_feature_fast_icon" android:textSize="22sp" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/customer_home_feature_fast_title" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/customer_home_feature_fast_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/gray_700" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/white" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeColor="#C9DBFF" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="#DCE8FF" app:cardCornerRadius="14dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/customer_home_feature_trusted_icon" android:textSize="22sp" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/customer_home_feature_trusted_title" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/customer_home_feature_trusted_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/gray_700" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/white" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeColor="#E5D6FF" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="#F0E6FF" app:cardCornerRadius="14dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/customer_home_feature_track_icon" android:textSize="22sp" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/customer_home_feature_track_title" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/customer_home_feature_track_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/gray_700" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/white" app:cardCornerRadius="16dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeColor="#C8F2D1" app:strokeWidth="1dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" app:cardBackgroundColor="#DDFBE5" app:cardCornerRadius="14dp" app:cardElevation="0dp" app:strokeWidth="0dp">
<TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:text="@string/customer_home_feature_pricing_icon" android:textColor="@color/green_600" android:textSize="22sp" android:textStyle="bold" /> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/customer_home_feature_pricing_title" android:textColor="@color/black" android:textSize="14sp" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/customer_home_feature_pricing_subtitle" android:textColor="@color/gray_700" android:textSize="12sp" /> </LinearLayout> </com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout> </androidx.core.widget.NestedScrollView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:id="@+id/cardWrapper" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:padding="2dp">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/active_delivery_material_card_view" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/white" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="2dp" app:strokeColor="@color/teal_700" app:strokeWidth="2dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="12dp">
<!-- Header with Customer and Status --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:baselineAligned="false" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:id="@+id/active_delivery_customer_name_text_view" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Customer Name" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodySmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="14dp"/>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/active_delivery_status_badge_linear_layout" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:background="@drawable/badge_background" android:gravity="center" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingTop="4dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:paddingBottom="4dp">
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:id="@+id/active_delivery_status_text_view" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Status" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelSmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnPrimary" />
</LinearLayout>
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:id="@+id/active_delivery_price_text_view" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_alignParentEnd="true" android:layout_centerVertical="true" android:text="$45.00" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceTitleMedium" android:textColor="@color/teal_700" android:textStyle="bold"/>
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:id="@+id/active_delivery_time_text_view" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Time" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodySmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Pickup Location --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:text="" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodyLarge" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Pickup" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelSmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" />
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:id="@+id/active_delivery_pickup_address_text_view" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:text="Address" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodySmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Drop-off Location --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:text="" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodyLarge" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Destination" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelSmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" />
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:id="@+id/active_delivery_destination_address_text_view" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:text="Address" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodySmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Action Buttons Container --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/active_delivery_buttons_container_linear_layout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:orientation="horizontal" />
</LinearLayout>
</com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</FrameLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <FrameLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:id="@+id/cardWrapper" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:padding="2dp">
<com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView android:id="@+id/active_delivery_material_card_view" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:cardBackgroundColor="@color/white" app:cardCornerRadius="12dp" app:cardElevation="2dp" app:strokeColor="@color/teal_700" app:strokeWidth="2dp">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="12dp">
<!-- Header with Customer and Status --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:baselineAligned="false" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:id="@+id/active_delivery_customer_name_text_view" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Customer Name" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodySmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="14dp"/>
<LinearLayout android:id="@+id/active_delivery_status_badge_linear_layout" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:background="@drawable/badge_background" android:gravity="center" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingTop="4dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:paddingBottom="4dp">
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:id="@+id/active_delivery_status_text_view" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Status" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelSmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnPrimary" />
</LinearLayout>
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:id="@+id/active_delivery_price_text_view" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:gravity="end" android:text="$45.00" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceTitleMedium" android:textColor="@color/teal_700" android:textStyle="bold"/>
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:id="@+id/active_delivery_time_text_view" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Time" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodySmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" />
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Pickup Location --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:text="" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodyLarge" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Pickup" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelSmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" />
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:id="@+id/active_delivery_pickup_address_text_view" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:text="Address" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodySmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Drop-off Location --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:gravity="center" android:text="" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodyLarge" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="12dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Destination" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceLabelSmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurfaceVariant" />
<com.google.android.material.textview.MaterialTextView android:id="@+id/active_delivery_destination_address_text_view" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="2dp" android:text="Address" android:textAppearance="?attr/textAppearanceBodySmall" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Action Buttons Container --> <LinearLayout android:id="@+id/active_delivery_buttons_container_linear_layout" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="32dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:orientation="horizontal" />
</LinearLayout>
</com.google.android.material.card.MaterialCardView>
</FrameLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <menu xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"> <item android:id="@+id/customerHomeFragment" android:icon="@drawable/ic_home" android:title="Home" /> <item android:id="@+id/customerNewOrderFragment" android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_add" android:title="New Order" /> <item android:id="@+id/customerMyOrdersFragment" android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_agenda" android:title="My Orders" /> <item android:id="@+id/customerProfileFragment" android:icon="@drawable/ic_person" android:title="Profile" /> </menu>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <menu xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"> <item android:id="@+id/customerHomeFragment" android:icon="@drawable/ic_home" android:title="Home" /> <item android:id="@+id/customerNewOrderFragment" android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_add" android:title="New Order" /> <item android:id="@+id/customerMyOrdersFragment" android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_agenda" android:title="My Orders" /> <item android:id="@+id/customerProfileFragment" android:icon="@drawable/ic_person_nav" android:title="Profile" /> </menu>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <menu xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"> <item android:id="@+id/driverActiveDeliveriesFragment" android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_recent_history" android:title="Active" /> <item android:id="@+id/driverCompletedDeliveriesFragment" android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_my_calendar" android:title="Completed" /> <item android:id="@+id/driverFinderFragment" android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_search" android:title="Finder" /> <item android:id="@+id/driverProfileFragment" android:icon="@drawable/ic_person" android:title="Profile" /> </menu>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <menu xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"> <item android:id="@+id/driverActiveDeliveriesFragment" android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_recent_history" android:title="Active" /> <item android:id="@+id/driverCompletedDeliveriesFragment" android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_my_calendar" android:title="Completed" /> <item android:id="@+id/driverFinderFragment" android:icon="@android:drawable/ic_menu_search" android:title="Finder" /> <item android:id="@+id/driverProfileFragment" android:icon="@drawable/ic_person_nav" android:title="Profile" /> </menu>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <resources> <!-- <string name="app_name">MobileFinalProject</string>--> <!-- <string name="app_title">TruckBack</string>--> <!-- <string name="login_subtitle">Login to continue</string>--> <!-- <string name="driver">Driver</string>--> <!-- <string name="customer">Customer</string>--> <!-- <string name="id_number">ID Number</string>--> <!-- <string name="enter_your_id">Enter your ID</string>--> <!-- <string name="password">Password</string>--> <!-- <string name="enter_phone_number">555-0123</string>--> <!-- <string name="login">Login</string>--> <!-- <string name="no_account">Don\'t have an account?</string>--> <!-- <string name="register">Register</string>--> <!-- <string name="register_title">Join TruckBack</string>--> <!-- <string name="register_subtitle">Create your account</string>--> <!-- <string name="full_name">Full Name</string>--> <!-- <string name="enter_your_name">Enter your name</string>--> <!-- <string name="email_optional">Email (Optional)</string>--> <!-- <string name="enter_email">your@email.com</string>--> <!-- <string name="create_account">Create Account</string>--> <!-- <string name="already_have_account">Already have an account?</string>--> <string name="my_orders_title">My Orders</string> <string name="my_orders_subtitle">Go over your pending orders</string> <string name="filters_label">Filter Orders:</string> <string name="sample_customer_name">Emily Davis</string> <string name="sample_price">$21.25</string> <string name="sample_status_pending">Pending</string> <string name="sample_date_time">2025-12-27 | 10:00</string> <string name="from_label">From</string> <string name="to_label">To</string> <string name="sample_pickup_address">555 Maple Dr, North</string> <string name="sample_destination_address">888 Cedar Ln, South</string> <string name="load_image">Load Image</string> <string name="active_delivery_customer_label">Customer Name</string> <string name="active_delivery_separator">|</string> <string name="active_delivery_status_label">Status</string> <string name="active_delivery_pickup_label">Pickup</string> <string name="active_delivery_pickup_time_format">%1$s • %2$s</string> <string name="active_delivery_address_time_label">Address | Time</string> <string name="active_delivery_destination_label">Destination</string> <string name="active_delivery_address_label">Address</string> <string name="active_delivery_location_icon_pickup"></string> <string name="active_delivery_location_icon_destination"></string> <string-array name="customer_order_status_filter_options"> <item>All</item> <item>Pending</item> <item>Accepted</item> <item>In Progress</item> <item>Completed</item> </string-array> <string name="finder_sample_customer_name">Emily Davis</string> <string name="finder_sample_price">$21.25</string> <string name="finder_sample_time">2025-12-27 • 10:00</string> <string name="finder_sample_pickup_address">555 Maple Dr, North</string> <string name="finder_sample_destination_address">888 Cedar Ln, South</string> <string name="delivery_image">Delivery Image</string> </resources>

name="already_have_account">Already have an account?</string>--> <string name="my_orders_title">My Orders</string> <string name="my_orders_subtitle">Go over your pending orders</string> <string
